park_name: Mount Barker Caravan & Tourist Park - South Aust

reviews.review_text: Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park is an excellent little park, with beautifully maintained gardens. It was very pretty on the cold misty Autumn mornings with all the coloured leaves. It is close to all the tourist spots in the hills, and very reasonably priced for a family to stay. Staff were very friendly and helpful and the newer styled cabin, nice and clean for our stay. Take a walk along the creek pathway to the shops or explore the region. Great place to stay.

Amazing place to stay in the heart of beautiful Mt Barker. The facilities are exceptionally well maintained, and as someone who appreciates a good shower, I have to say the water pressure is amazing 😉.

The location is perfect — within walking distance of shops, cinemas, public transport, picturesque walking trails, and a well-maintained oval where the furbabies can run around or you can kick a footy.

Managers Mike and Trent go above and beyond to ensure your stay is safe, comfortable, and enjoyable. They conduct security patrols day and night, which is incredibly reassuring and adds to the peaceful atmosphere of the park.

The park itself is very quiet and truly a wonderful place to relax while exploring everything the Adelaide Hills has to offer.

I highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a picturesque and serene getaway.

I can not speak high enough about this beautiful park. What a fantastic central location to explore Adelaide and the Hills. The best part by far, are Mike and Trent who run it, two of the nicest guys you'd meet and the know the area so well and are happy to help with your itinerary.

we are staying in the so-called disability cabin and it's nothing short of when cyclone Tracy slammed its way into Darwin in 1974, leaving a trail of carnage and destruction from ahole to breakfast!!!!!! not happy JAN !!!
You will enjoy your time at the mtbarker caravan Park
Great location with an easy walk to the shops. Good lighting at night to keep you safe. Amenities were a bit dated but they have good water pressure. Quite place to stay. Friendly staff.

My room was disgusting, dirt everywhere, pubes in the shower, and when I brought it up with Trent at the front desk he just laughed and said he wouldn't refund the one night cleaning fee of $50, which is all I asked for as my room was obviously not cleaned in the first place. He also gave me a disabled access room which would have been ok if he told me, but the TV was at knee height and the sink was so low it hurt my back, I'm so thankful that I only booked one night here. Trent also walks around at night with a torch looking into cabins and peoples cars, my partner and I found him very disturbing and creepy.
I was expecting something much nicer than this for a cabin at $245 a night, stay away at all costs in my advice.

If you are travelling in or near the Adelaide Hills don't miss the opportunity to stay at The Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park. From the moment you walk into the office there is a warm and friendly greeting from management, which extends throughout your stay from all staff. The park is a beautiful treed setting, with facilities maintained emaculately. The sites are spacious with a sports oval on the left as you enter, excellent for taking the dog for a walk. Its a short walk to the shops and all the facilities Mount Barker has to offer.  We highly recommend Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park as an excellent caravan park to choose and to stay for a few days.

If you are travelling in or near the Adelaide Hills don't miss the opportunity to stay at The Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park. From the moment you walk into the office there is a warm and friendly greeting from management, which extends throughout your stay from all staff. The park is a beautiful treed setting, with facilities maintained emaculately. The sites are spacious with a sports oval on the left as you enter, excellent for taking the dog for a walk. Its a short walk to the shops and all the facilities Mount Barker has to offer.  We highly recommend Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park as an excellent caravan park to choose and to stay for a few days.
Great park & location to Adelaide & Hahndorf. Very reasonably priced. Amenities kept spotless. Caravan Park managers are very helpful & go beyond the call of duty. We are from WA & we will be back.
perfect cabins, great location and excellent customer service. Will be back for sure. Thanks.

Great location for seeing all there is to see in Adelaide and Adelaide Hills.  Bus terminal  shirt walk from park where you can access wherever you wish to visit.|Great hosts.  Park possibly more suited to couples as not lot of kids facilities there but nonetheless great spot and good value for money.

We stayed 7 days on a powered site,  the park is very clean, staff is super friendly and the park is close to Harndorf and Adelaide and still  over $300 cheeper then caravan parks around. We loved our stay so if your in the area please stay you will love it.
A lovely park to stay at - clean and comfortable and loved the camp kitchen - 10 min walk to bus transit station to access Adelaide!

Second time staying here and will always choose to stay here. Cabin was modern, clean and well equiped.
Staff were wonderful to deal with.
Location is quiet yet close to town still.
Perfect spot to explore the hills from or travel into Adelaide without being too far away.
Clean well appointed cabin. Hot shower and comfortable bed. A short walk to shopping and entertainment. All in all a wonderful site and most pleasant stay.
We stayed here for an extended time waiting to start our travels. Management were amazing as were the facilities and park itself. We will definitely be back.

This is a great park, clean, quiet and well maintained. The owners are friendly and helpful. The shops are in walking distance. The rooms are fantastic and well equipped. We love our stay here and have been several times and will come again.
We had a great stay! Booked last minute and Mike was so helpful and accommodating.  Amenities and lovely and clean.  Nice shaded gravel sites and only a short walk to the shops. Great place to stay.

I would have to say one of the cleanest, well kept, hidden gems of the Adelaide hills. The gentleman owner was fantastic, so kind and helpful. I would highly recommend. Great location to shops, clean amenities and surrounds.
Amazing park with great staff

Finally got to stay at this park. The managers are very accommodating to visitors' needs and work hard to keep the grounds to a meticulous standard. Easy walk to the town centre which is a mix of heritage buildings, a mall and all major supermarkets. Will definitely be back.

As a caravan park, good sized sites (gravel). A couple of camp kitchen areas and some nicely maintained lawn area.
Clean ablution blocks.
Friendly management.
Located within 5 minutes walk of down town Mt Barker.
A number of newer cabins available also.
A lovely caravan park with a friendly atmosphere. The manager is brilliant and goes above and beyond. We are really grateful. Thank you :)
The  lovely cabin & park was quiet & very clean. The staff, helpful & friendly. The shopping Mall is within easy walking distance. We will definitely be back!
Work trip for 7. Wonderful owner and great accommodation.

Mike and the guys here were awesome. Called to see if I could check in early, not an issue. Greeted at check-in & then Mike walked us to our site which was 39, very nice and spacious drive through site. Not a heap for kids to do, but massive park and small playground. My kids were fine. Very clean park & hosts were great and offered advice on what to do locally and in the surrounding places. Would definitely stay here again.

Booked cabins to stay in for a family wedding March long weekend. The cabins were great ! Modern,clean and sitting in pretty grounds . Location was great a short walk or even shorter drive to everything . Staff were super friendly . Would definetly recomend if you need accomodation in Mt Barker.

Location was perfect for day trips in and around Mount Barker, easy 10 min drive to Hahndorf. The park itself is spotless, so well maintained, the caravan sites are very generous and flat. Staff very friendly.

Very friendly staff at a quiet location although close enough to the shops
We stayed 2 nights and enjoyed our visit and will be back again soon

Hidden Gem in the Adelaide Hills!! Fantastic service, park is manicured with plenty of green space to sit and have a drink with company.  Although the park is children friendly with an adjacent oval, it seems to be preferred by couples as the park is exceptionally quiet and peaceful.  Multiple BBQ areas and camp kitchen, great little laundry with modern appliances that are clean and well looked after. Trent and Mike are fantastic hosts, the staff keep the well maintained amenities spotless and stocked.  It's just a lovely place to park up for a few days and reset, or use as a base to sample all the Adelaide Hills has to offer - either way - you're in the right place!
A fantastic well-maintained caravan park. Excellent staff. Spotless amenities. Close to everything. Backs onto a public oval. We would definitely stay again and highly recommend.

Great spot close to town and wineries of Adelaide Hills. Most sites have a lot of shade and the customer service is great here if you find Mike :)
Recommended as a base for touring around. Ngeringa winery is closest and refreshingly different and the wine is next level. Prancing Pony beer was also great! Hahndorf nearby so many options for food wine and beer
Excellent park with helpful, friendly staff and good amenities. Highly recommend for holiday or longer stay.

A real gem of a park. And a pleasure to recommend.
Been to many parks throughout aust for the last 18years.
Shady in hottest time of summer, clean amenities, reasonable prices for laundry facilities. Welcomed at a very busy time of year.  Honestly is my favourite park of all the ones I've been.
Thankyou for kindnesses expressed .
Fantastic large drive through sites, very clean amenities and close to all shops and other towns

Very clean and tidy park.  Friendly and helpful staff.  Convenient to shops.  I stayed in a cabin and it was clean and tidy too.  Comfy bed.
Management seems to be continuously looking on how to improve the park, he obviously likes his Park and job.

2nd stay.
1st - cabin
2nd - private van
Great service. Lovely quiet, clean park. Close to town. Great walking paths run along the perimeter. Rabbits run through the park at all hours.
Highly recommend
The staff here are terrific. They went out of their way to help us when we were there.  The facilities are also very good.
What a lovely Park..couldn't be more accommodating.  Excellent location to town.

Great medium sized park with good facilities.  Good sized spots that are easy to get into and your not on top of others.   The Manager was a card and very helpful for my last minute booking enquiry.  30 minutes tp Adelaide.   5-10mins to regular shopping.  Bonus. Will definitely come back.

I was greeted by Friendly, welcoming staff. The park is tidy and very well maintained.
Powered site had heaps of room and shady.

Great location for exploring the Hills, and very reasonably priced.  Pretty quiet as it's aimed at long term travellers and Grey Nomads. Staff are lovely and very helpful. Amenities are spotless, and the general area is well looked after. They have some very new cabins, but I can't comment as I'm in a caravan.

An Awesome Caravan Park.  Country feel. Amazing Manager's. Nothing is too hard for them. The most Genuine guys, you are privileged to meet. Amenities great 👍 👌 👏
💯 Anyone who doesn't appreciate this Park has a problem 😊

Stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin for 2 nights. The cabin was very comfortable and had all the necessary utensils to be able to cook a meal if you are so inclined. The beds are very comfortable. It is great that the toilet is separate from the bathroom. Management very helpful and accommodating.
Mike the manager was a great bloke, very helpful 👍🏽
Great place to stay, clean and up to date cabins that are extremely comfortable and well equipped. Friendly staff and very convenient location, close to shops and cafes as well as natural areas.

We stayed in the cabin for a total of 4 nights. The cabin was a bit modern with good facilities inside,however it seems like they didn't clean the area properly before we check in.. There's some rubbish in the cupboard, the main room has alot of dust meaning they didn't vacuum it properly. The main downfall of the park as well is that there's no internet connection in the cabin. With the price abit high I guess it would be better if you get a good service especially a wifi connection.

Michael and Trent thank you so much for your hospitality.
Michael you were a perfect host making sure us ladies were well organised with social outings 😄
We had an amazing time.
The boys went above and beyond to make us feel at home also taking care of one of our ladies with a bit of a van mishap.
The park itself is clean, comfortable and has a fantastic gazebo area which is perfect for happy hrs
We will be back. Cheers 🍻
From the LLLs 😄  I'm changing the group name to you know what 😄
A group of Ladies having a weekend away. Couldn't wish for a better place to stay. Hosts were very cheerful, welcoming and could not do enough to make our stay enjoyable.

We stayed on a powered site.  Top customer service from the whole team.  The grounds are very impressive neat, tidy & green.  The facilities are very clean and tidy.  The location is perfect to walk to town and excellent for exploring the area.
Great sites, well maintained, clean ablutions (a little dated, but still good), excellent host (Mike)

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Exceptional Service and Hospitality

My wife and I had just collected our brand new caravan from Adelaide and, after a long and exhausting handover day, we arrived in Mount Barker without a booking. Despite the park being fully booked, Mike went above and beyond to assist us — rearranging a few bookings to kindly secure us a site near the oval.

Both Mike and Trent personally guided us to the site, helped us get settled, and ensured everything was in order before leaving us to rest. Their professionalism, genuine kindness, and willingness to help were outstanding.

We also witnessed the same level of care when a neighbouring guest experienced a flat tyre — Mike and Trent immediately stepped in to assist without hesitation. This level of customer service and compassion is what truly sets this park apart.

The park itself is beautifully maintained, well laid out, with spotless amenities that function perfectly. Being pet friendly is another huge plus and certainly secures our return in the future.

A sincere thank you to Mike, Trent, and the Mount Barker Caravan & Tourist Park team for delivering such exceptional hospitality. Your efforts made a challenging day end on a very positive note.

Five stars from us — we look forward to staying again.
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Can’t fault the staff - super friendly and so helpful. Great park to stay in. Amenities are spotless. Highly recommend.
Trent & Mike do an excellent job 👍
Great place to stay. Cabins are great as are the surroundings.
Very clean tidy and great service
Massive thanks to Trent and team squeezing our van in last minute when the park was full. Allowing us to spend time in Mt Barker hospital after our daughter blessed us with our 1st grandchild
We'll situated. Enjoyed our stay
Just down the road from Handorf, with good size sites for caravans and clean functional facilities. Definitely enjoyed our stay

This caravan park is in such a great location
The amenities were so clean a credit to the cleaners the grounds were very well kept and a boom gate entrance made it feel secure it was a lovely visit and we will be back
Glenn and Carole
Couldn't  be closer to town if you tried.  Place was well kept and maintained and staff were great .. friendly  and easy to access.

Nice clean well appointed deluxe cabins, reasonably priced, quiet end of town, suits more middle age to older people though does have a small toddler playground..nice staff,  easy access to town and bus depot

Stayed a couple of nights
Clean park and amenities
Mike was very friendly

This is our second stay here, this park is in a great location for us to visit family in Adelaide and also have a look around the beautiful towns in the area.
The management here are the most helpful that we have come across in a long time.. cheerful and so helpful,  always up for a quick chat..

Thanks Again

Arrived after hours but texts and an email were sent out to inform me of how to get into the site. Was easy enough setting up everything and had a comfortable, quiet night.

Location was also a plus, plenty around within walking distance (including an anytime fitness!).
Best place to visit, extra helpful in our hour of need
Lovely park . Great staff. Thank you

A perfect place to make your home base as you explore this region.
Michael and Trent do a stellar job, welcoming, informative and friendly.  The park is in a great location being walking distance to a huge selection of shops, cafes and restaurants.  A bus stop close by will take you to Adelaide.
The amenities are aged but cleaned daily.

Great van park, clean amenities, close to everything you need and great bud service to Adelaide .. Managers Mike  and Trent  are amazing.
Best value in town.
Quiet park, clean facilities! 5/5 for the wonderful staff. Called in late arvo on a very wet day and was met with kindness and care. Thanks for the stay!

Could not be more thankful to Trent & Mike!
We had booked to stay elsewhere for the Winter Reds Festival this weekend, but that location turned out to be unsuitable.  A very last minute call and we got in after 6pm on 2 site as we needed.

They even accommodated our request to leave late on Sunday due to a Lunch booking.

Sites we generous and the Toilets & Showers were extremely clean.

Managers Mike and Trent are fantastic! Very friendly and super helpful!
Thankyou 😊

Great caravan sites considering just a council park. Friendly and accommodating managers.
Toilet blocks a bit old but clean with showers excellent.
Attractive town close by with very neat subdivisions and handy to Hahndorf ( 15 minutes )and Adelaide (30 minutes )

We had a lovely caravan site here. Manager was very welcoming. All ammenities are very clean as well as the park itself. Walking distance to the shops, restaurants, pubs.
Thank you for our lovely stay. 😊
Great Park very friendly.

Absolutely great host.
Park is a little tight and amenities are old but get cleaned every day.
Would recommend a few nights here.
A great place and very quiet and the staff were friendly
Great overnight stay in our motor home. Drive through sight, clean amenities and wonderful, friendly staff. Just a short walk into the lovely town of Mount Barker with many shops. Thankyou 😊
Overall a nice caravan park with everything you need. BBQ area nice.
Stayed 2 nights in a deluxe cabin. Very cosy & well equipped. Staff very helpful. Park is in close proximity to shops. Would highly recommend.

Great location and the staff were so so friendly and kind. Facilities are clean and the grounds are well looked after.

Only downside would be that the camp kitchen didn't have a hob and was just some appliances in the laundry toom.

But because it was such a nice experience it still absolutely gets 5 stars all round.

Super kind and helpful team
There’s a fridge and kettle and toaster and bbq facilities but no stove/gas top just to be aware
But would totally come back
Helpful  staff

Can't praise the staff enough.  Allocated us a site for as long as we needed for urgent repairs to our 4x4.  Perfect location as Toyota mechanics in nearby vicinity.  Definitely, will be back to stay with them, as a little consideration goes a long way.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. All staff were very welcoming, friendly and helpful.
The caravan site was quiet, easily accessible for our large caravan, and we had plenty of room.
The amenities were very clean.
Highly recommend!
Super friendly staff and the cabins are very comfortable and cozy
Very tidy park

The park is quiet and located within a short walk to town. The staff are really friendly and all the facilities were very clean.
A great location to explore, the Hills, the surrounding district, Adelaide or if you wish, simply relax in the park.

Great location - walking distance to shops. Amenities were clean, bays ample size for car and caravan. Beautiful gardens and lawn area, bbq area shaded and has a fridge too. Even had someone come in and do fish and chips on Friday night - and also available Saturday and Sunday night. Would definitely recommend and stay again
Great location and very nice cabins. Enjoyable experience.

Great little park , lovely very clean cabins situated near the centre of town but in a quiet spot with gumtrees around.
Mike and Trent are excellent hosts , very friendly and obliging.

Great caravan Park to kick back & relax! All of the staff are very friendly & helpful. Has that small country town feel to it, even the residents are friendly, unlike some of the bigger parks. Thanks for a great stay.

Mike and Trent are the best caravan park managers we have had in 20 years of travelling. They go over and above to support you and offer assistance when needed.
The park and amenities are spotless and a credit to their hard work. Great location to shops.
Thanks guys, Lee & Kathleen.
Great caravan park, very central to town and surrounding areas.

A great Caravan Park with excellent frieny staff who ensure everything is perfect.
The park is very well maintained and ALL amenities are spotless.
Had a beautiful spot under a tree - Perfect
Thank you for a great stay

The friends that we were traveling with broke down while towing their caravan. We had to make an unexpected stop at the Mt Barker Caravan Park - what a life saver! The owners could not have been more helpful and even blocked out extra time for us to stay as the repair time of the car was unknown. The facilities were spotless, lovely BBQ area and walking distance to the shopping area. Would highly recommend staying there.

Amazing all round and an exceptionally clean , convenient, wonderful staff.
I would recommend and definitely love to stay there again.

They are legends!

We did last minute booking with RTT and got a spot for a night, i really appreciate it. Really nice big spot with power and water under a big tree which was much appreciated on our hot rest day. Really reasonable prices.

Very helpful and friendly staff.
All amenities are very nice and  clean, you can see they work hard to keep everything on high quality ! Good location, next to a nice town, cycle lanes are just next to the park connected wherever you need to go, some nice rock climbing and hikes close by.
Really not a place for families in caravans. Extra charge per kid per day but they provide no kids amenities to justify the cost. Toilet facilities are dated and they pack you in tightly.

A lovely caravan park! We were on our way from Perth to Melbourne and had a stop at Mount Barker Caravan Park to relax and chill for 2 days. The staff is so friendly and were helpful throughout our whole stay. We had a minor issue with our car so Mike arranged an appointment with a local mechanic. Furthermore the amenities are clean and the BBQ area is great. Thanks again! Take care, Frans & Maddy.
We were so grateful to Mike that he was able to squeeze us in for the night last minute! He was super friendly and guided us straight to our site. Thanks for a lovely visit!
The crew at Mt Barker made you feel welcomed. Trent and Mick made every effort to pick a site that suited you. Thanks guys

A lovely little caravan park, easy to access, large sites, some drive through.
We enjoyed being camped in our caravan under beautiful large shady cedars which was a blessing on a 43 degree day.
The amenities were the older style however very clean & well maintained.
We definitely recommend as a base for exploring the Adelaide Hills & surrounds with the Monarto Safari Park being only a short drive away.

This caravan Park is perfect for us visiting family in Nairne. We love the location and the pool next door, close to supermarkets, chemist etc we have stayed in several cabins in the last 5 years, usually come over from Victoria in the school holidays. The park is always clean and tidy, the cabins are fresh and homely. TV's in each room, air con and heating. Showers are fabulous! We enjoy staying there, no issues when booking. My son loves the playground too. My only suggestion is to put a sail/shade over the playground and possibly a seat for parents otherwise we are very happy with the accommodation offered here. We will be back.

Lovely small caravan. The staff were so friendly and helpful. The amenities while dates are exceptionally clean and well presented. Nice BBQ area with plenty of seating and green grass. There is a very small playground and it’s close to the public pool.
Close to supermarkets and other shops.
Would definitely stay again.

Pet friendly caravan park, set amongst the trees. Green and lush with friendly staff and reasonably priced.
They staff constantly empty bins which means no build up of rubbish like in a lot of other parks. Nestled in the Adelaide Hills you are also close to Adelaide.  Perfect spot
Lovely park and great staff
Lovely caravan park , beautiful lawn and gardens. Very quiet park with lots  of different birds singing which we loved .Walking distance to town . Definitely would stay here again .

What a great park, lovely trees, amenities spotless, managers so friendly. Very close to town and Mount Barker and Hahndorf townships fantastic. Pet friendly with a big oval adjoining the park to walk your dog. We stayed on a powered site.
Lovely caravan park and very clean amenities, they have great staff who are very helpful

Owners are horrible people who judge and discriminate against so many people it's a wonder they are still in business. Apart from the horrible staff and average at best location. The entire park is rundown and needs a new owner to bring it back to life.
Very nice, treed, well maintained caravan park,  great staff, spotless amenities, close to Hahdorf

Arrived and instantly felt disappointed. We booked a 5 birth executive cabin, with the assumption that this would include 5 beds. On arrival we were informed that we would be required to pay for the linen (2) linen sets to make up the beds in the second bedroom. $25 per set, along with an additional charge of $30 per head for the guests staying in the second room.
The main bed was made and the second bedroom that we needed to house our group was additional cost.
From a management perspective these costs create  very negative situation. They may want to consider including these costs in the quoted and advertised room prices.
We have done a lot of travel and never seen anything like this.

Cabins undergoing modernisation, excellent condition. Friendly helpful service. Peaceful location near creek, natural setting, birds. Walking distance to shopping centre with Coles, and places to eat. In-cabin kitchen with full electric hob, full-size fridge, and the rest for preparing family meals. Location convenient to Mount Barker entry to motorway to Adelaide.
Very friendly caretakers great place to park the van returned after a few days great spot close to shops
Fantastic park , staff are very friendly , amenities are nice and clean   Very close to shops
Very quiet at night
Great cabins...beautiful area ...shit weather..lol
Car park molt pràctic, a prop de Handforth i de Cleland Wildlife Park reserve. També ubicat a les Adelaide hills i a 30 min del centre de la city i de l'aeroport.

I don’t regret going here! This so far has been one of the best caravan parks I been to! It’s only a few minutes away from home,the staff are the most welcoming people and the quiet nature view is just beautiful. Thank you guys. I will be returning in the future!

The managers at Mt Barker Caravan Park made our stay so enjoyable. They were so kind and thoughtful to ensure our time there was the very best it could be, even though we were having difficulties with our van. We cannot recommend this beautiful caravan park and its managers more highly.
Great spot walk to shops
We found mount barker caravan park to be absolutely fabulous. The staff were very friendly and assisted us immensely during a difficult situation. Thank you so much
Nice clean amenities, as well as excellent customer service! Made for a lovely stay

Run fast and Run far from this caravan park. Room I stayed in was paper thin you can hear everything around you. The old lady in the reception needs to retire she’s too rude no help at all from her after they’ve collected your money and you’ve checked in. They always question you for everything. You can’t do that you can’t do that should be their motto.

Been back here a few times now. Lovely small caravan park with a lot of full time residents that are respectful and quiet. Lovely helpful owners who are very helpful/polite.
Shower block needs a upgrade however,  in particular the mens showers  which run hot and cold.

Thanks Wayne you made our trip and crew feel very welcome. We appreciate the little extra service and banter. A must stop for traveler's nice quiet little park , brand new chalets reasonably priced. Great drive thru spots. … walking distance to town everything you need. Good quiet vibes and lots of long chats with the other travellers.
Quiet, very friendly, welcoming environment. The rooms were fantastic.
Just beautiful.  Cabin was superb with everything needed for a comfy sleep.  Kylie and Wayne are so welcoming that anyone who stays here won't be disappointed.  Cannot recommend higher.  🙂

We have never been to a caravan park so quiet, day and night. The drive through site we had was huge and perfectly flat. The gardens are all well maintained, and the staff were some of the most welcoming people I've ever met. We'll definitely be back.
Polite and friendly staff. Loved the stay and will be back.

Very well kept park staff are very helpful
Great location to explore Adelaide Hills from
Everything is good, only camp kitchen is too small.
Lovwly caravan park close to the town centre. Dog friendly.
We stayed a lot longer than expected due to caravan problems. Kylie

A really nice friendly  park. Wayne is a great manager that makes you feel like your a family member.  Amenities are immaculate and there is an oval across the rd for the dogs and easy walking into town
Can’t speak highly enough of this caravan park. Management, ground staff all fantastic. One of the better places to stay in the Adelaide Hills
Neat quiet little caravan park with none of the hoohaa of slides jumpy pillows etc
It is an amazing place to stay in

The staff Kylie and Wayne were fantastic. They went out of their way to be helpful. The park is very nice and peaceful. The amenities were clean with good pressure in the showers. We will come back to stay.

Fabulous CP in a great location and very friendly management.
We phoned last minute and were placed in an overflow area as the park was pretty much booked out. Turns out the overflow spot was excellent, grassed, sunny and private.
Would definitely come back to Mt Barker CP.

We stayed in our van with our dog for 6 nights. The park is beautiful and shady. The amenities were clean and well maintained. The staff were helpful and friendly. The manager even backed some people's vans into their site for them. It was walking distance to all the shops, cafes and restaurants. The location was fabulous for the beautiful beaches and the many cellar doors and tourist attractions the area has to offer. I highly recommend this caravan park.

Quite a nice place to stay. Mt Barker seems to have everything you'd need pretty close-by. Just don't check under the beds when you get in, it looks like they haven't paid attention to the floor under there for quite a long time.

Lovely place, Management very Friendly & helpful. Close to shops/public transport etc in Mount Barker and an easy drive to Hahndorf. Caravan site are gravel and close to amenities. Great spot to base yourself while exploring the adelaide hills.

Do not think of staying here if you have children

It has been made very clear that our children are not welcome here. Awful service standards

very quiet caravan park in the hills. walking distance into Mt Barker
Excellent site, exceptional gardens.
Excellent park and facilities.  Management exceptional
Wij stonden mooi aan het groen maar veel plaatsen staan op het grind. Douche en toiletten waren schoon. Prima gelegen dicht bij de winkels en het dorp.
Large shady sites

We came here from Melbourne, and arrived near to midnight after a long drive. Everything was simple and easy, had all the space and requirements we needed. Only negative note was that the second bedroom beds were a tiny bit short on leg room for myself, an average male adult. Didn't impact my sleep though.

My partner and I hired one of the cabins available. Our Cabin had a lovely kitchen/living room area, and two small bedrooms. The bathroom was quite small. It was fine for two adults, but four adults would be pushing things. We didn't require any additional services. There was one thing that was a little frustrating, there was a community barbeque/garden area very close to our cabin, and over the three nights we were there, there was a band playing there until 10pm every night we stayed. That would have been good to know about ahead of time.
Very clean amenities well maintained gardens clean bbq with tables and chairs available quiet and close to shopping.
Nice park, good amenities,  service by Wayne was lovely and friendly.  Sadly the weather let us down and it was cold wet and miserable.

Very tidy, well shaded sites. Great location, next to sports oval for walking dogs etc, nice walk/cycle paths from beside park. Very close to shops, public transport but also quet, peaceful park.  Amenities are very clean, staff very helpful and pleasant. Easy access.
Very neat tidy park, good site for us in coach with trailer and good access

Facilities falling apart! Charge extra for toddlers yet no facilities for them.
Worst park we’ve been too at this dollar value.
Definitely recommend staying in sea cliff park instead for the same money, overall heaps better value and location!

We recently had a three night stay in our caravan at the Mount Barker Caravan and Tourist Park. It's a lovely park, everything is kept tidy and the amenities blocks are clean. We found it to be really quiet at night time too. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Lovely spot.
Great park stay all the time when in Adelaide  great caravan park

Highly recommend this caravan park. It's such a quiet place. We stayed here 5 nights in our van. The staff/owners? were really lovely and helpful. Toilet amenities were lovely and clean, and it's a short walk to the shops, cafe's and such.

Hallo,
ich war mal auf der Durchreise nach Adelaide zu Gast im Mt. Barker Caravan Park für 1 Nacht.
Leider kann ich nicht viel sagen dazu, da ich abends sehr spät dort eintraf. Konnte aber schnell mein Zelt auf einem Platz aufbauen und am nächsten morgen Nachträglich ein und gleich wieder auschecken. Ging problemlos und das Personal war sehr freundlich. Der Platz war recht gut angelegt, schattig und sauber. Waschräume und Toiletten waren auch sehr sauber.
Der Platz war großzügig gestaltet für Wohnwagen und auch Zelte. Bis zum Zentrum war es nicht weit, nur 3 Min. mit dem Auto. Es hat mir gefallen, auch wenn ich nur sehr kurz da war. Danke nachträglich für die Freundlichkeit und den Service.

Nice small park next to a oval in the heart of Mt Barker
Gravel sites and gravel roads so expect dust
Lots of shade
Relatively quiet

I gave a 1 star rating as the old battlax in the office was so rude and for this reason we won’t be back

She doesn’t seem to like pretty women, kids or big vans
We have stayed here over the years and always come back. great park managers are great amenities are very clean
A very nice, quiet little caravan park. Good size sites. You may even catch sight of mum & bub possum in the evening, along the back fence.

Stayed at this location multiple times over the years and has always been top value for the money. Close to shops and town centre. Room was clean and I believe newly renovated. Best place in Mount Barker to stay.
Great caravan park, near a large oval. Very close to the main shopping centre. Adequate sized sites  even for a large van like ours. Very pleasant and helpful staff. Would return again.

Have stayed previously and have found this to be a great place. Staff are very friendly and nothing is too much trouble. Amenities are fine and our site was more than adequate. Easy access to centre of town and as a base for surrounding area. Recommend it to everyone.
What a wonderful find! Thougherly enjoyed our stay. Would highly recommend.  We will be back!
Great park close to shops

My stay here was lovely, the price was affordable and of good value, everything was clean and tidy. One thing that stood out here was the wonderful friendly service which was evident when i accidently left keys in my cabin and the office was closed, the owner was on his way out and seen i looked flustered and with no hesitation helped me to get a spare key and open the boom gate for me and still was so friendly kind to help in heavy rain mind you. Thats service to me. Will be coming back if need a stay at Mt Barker again.
Our cabin was  spacious with a lovely view of the local footy oval. There were a few maintenance issues which we notified the office of and the owners came over immediately to discuss with us.
